pattern: Grouping values by depth is a breadth-first sweep — process one full level before descending, recording each level as its own list.
hints: Values on the same depth belong together, top level first, so think layer by layer rather than path by path.
Keep the current level's nodes; their children, in left-to-right order, form the next level.
A queue gives this naturally: pop exactly the count of nodes currently queued to finish one level before the next begins.

edge_inputs.description: classic three-level tree with a gap on the left
left-skewed chain — every level has exactly one node

stress.note: first element non-null so the root exists
